short_summary: War ongoing; Iran deal may shift US focus
rationale: Active war remains the overwhelming reality for Ukrainians; Ukraine's continued strikes on Russian energy infrastructure are a direct war development; the Iran deal dispute keeps US attention partially divided, which is a background concern for Western support.

top_events.title: Ukraine continues striking Russian energy infrastructure after hitting sea terminal
top_events.summary: Ukraine actively targeting Russian energy assets signals ongoing offensive capability, directly relevant to the war's trajectory and Ukrainian morale and strategy.

top_events.title: Trump says US-Iran deal to be signed Sunday; Tehran disputes timing
top_events.summary: If the US finalizes an Iran deal, diplomatic bandwidth and attention may shift away from Ukraine, potentially affecting the pace of Western military and financial support.

top_events.title: Anthropic AI tools suspended over US government security concerns
top_events.summary: Distant from Ukraine's immediate war reality; no direct impact on Ukrainian daily life or the conflict.
